title: Shenir Rix

{{Quote|I know what you're interested in! Let's talk.|Shenir Rix|<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" />}}
'''Shenir Rix''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] reputed to be one of the most reliable [[Information broker/Legends|information dealers]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Formerly an employee of [[Fergriss Pharmaceuticals/Legends|Fergriss Pharmaceuticals]], Rix was forced out of her job after an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] assault put the company out of business. Relying on her business pedigree and a keen sense of the importance of things, Rix transitioned into a career as an informant. By [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]], Rix began to routinely frequent posh [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] establishments, using her charm to pry valuable intelligence from rich yet unlucky patrons.

==Biography==
[[File:G11rix.jpg|thumb|left|140px|Shenir Rix, 10 ABY]]
[[Reproduction/Legends|Born]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]],<ref name="Date1" /> Shenir Rix was once a highly placed member of [[Fergriss Pharmaceuticals/Legends|Fergriss Pharmaceuticals]], until the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] enacted a devastating assault on the company's [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], putting it out of business and effectively ending Rix's professional career. In turn, Rix utilized her business savvy to embark upon a life of [[Information broker/Legends|information brokering]]. By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Rix was reputed to be one of the best and most reliable information dealers in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" />—but at the expense of turning on her own people by working for the Empire.<ref name="Rebellion Guide">[[Star Wars: Rebellion: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: Rebellion'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref>

Rix continued to ply her trade as an informant<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" /> by [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]],<ref name="Date1" /> working some of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy's]] most high-class [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] establishments, where she routinely bought and sold information. Playing the role of the unlucky gambler's best friend, Rix obtained much of her inside information from wealthy and influential yet habitually losing gamblers. By virtue of her charm and honest reputation, Rix had yet to attract the antagonism of some of her more seedier competitors. Nevertheless, the Empire charged her with illegal dissemination of classified data, categorizing Rix as criminal [[TracSheet]] Subject 55735573-QUUB-468835.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" />

==Personality and traits==
Shenir Rix was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] of tall, slender physique,<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" /> with [[Color/Legends|brown]] skin<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> touched with light olive mottling<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" /> and black [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> She stood 1.9 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in height. Rix was known to wear expensive [[Clothing/Legends|clothing]] and jewelry<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" />—by 10 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="Date1" /> she adorned her face with [[Piercing/Legends|piercings]] above the right eye and right [[Nose/Legends|nostril]].<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" />

Following the Imperial dismantling of Fergriss Pharmaceuticals, Rix successfully adapted her business acumen and sharp sense of importance into a new career as an information dealer.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" /> She came to be regarded as one of the galaxy's premier informants<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> and took professional pride in delivering quality and timely information.<ref name="Rebellion Guide" /> If information came from Rix, one could be guaranteed of its accuracy. She dealt only in solid, reliable intelligence<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> usually less than a [[Standard day/Legends|day]] old;<ref name="Rebellion Guide" /> her Imperial TracSheet data<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" /> in 10 ABY<ref name="Date1" /> claimed that she never dealt in information more than twenty [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] old. Rix's charisma and honest reputation helped her avoid coming into conflict with competing informants.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" />

Rix's first name, "[[Shenir]]," was a local [[Spice/Legends|spice]] found on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], while her surname meant "secretive" in the [[Mon Calamari (language)/Legends|Mon Calamarian]] [[Language/Legends|language]].<ref name="Galactic Campaign Guide">''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

==Skills and abilities==
Rix was [[Technician/Legends|technically adept]] at [[Computer/Legends|computer]] [[Programmer/Legends|programming]] and repair, and she had knowledge in economics and [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement]].<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" />

==Equipment==
Rix's equipment included [[Datachip/Legends|datachips]], a [[recording rod]], and a [[Hold-out blaster/Legends|hold-out blaster]].<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" />

==Behind the scenes==
Shenir Rix was created for the [[1994]] [[West End Games]] sourcebook ''[[Galaxy Guide 11: Criminal Organizations]]'', written by [[Rick D. Stuart]]. She serves as a character example of a criminal informant for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. Artist [[Mike Vilardi]] provided the sourcebook's illustration of Rix.<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" />

Rix was later included in the [[1998]] [[Star Wars video games|PC game]] [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] as a playable character available to the Galactic Empire.<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> The Rix character is used most effectively in gameplay as a [[Spy/Legends|spy]] to gather information on [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] systems and can also take on some dangerous missions with her combat abilities.<ref name="Rebellion Guide" />

The [[2003]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] sourcebook ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'' included the names "Shenir" and "Rix" among a list of Mon Calamari names with a corresponding cultural or translation meaning.<ref name="Galactic Campaign Guide" />

===Inconsistencies===
Sources vary regarding the timeliness of Rix's acquired information. ''Galaxy Guide 11'', which is set in 10 ABY,<ref name="Date1" /> notes that Rix never exchanges information older than twenty hours;<ref name="Galaxy Guide 11" /> the ''Star Wars: Rebellion'' in-game encyclopedia, set in [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]],<ref name="Date2">[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] is set the [[Standard day/Legends|day]] after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which corresponds to the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> states that Rix only deals in information less than twenty-four hours old;<ref name="Star Wars: Rebellion" /> while the ''[[Star Wars: Rebellion: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' more generally states that Rix's information is "usually" less than twenty-four hours old.<ref name="Rebellion Guide" /> This article attempts to reconcile each set of information, effectively as competing [[in-universe]] reports.
